title: KonciPET UI
description: Redecorates your inventory and adds a little axolotl companion!
body:
A themed UI meant initially as a personal pack for myself, KonciPET UI is an ongoing personalized GUI project. It includes:

- Animated Axolotl companion! (present in all UI with a recipe book, acting as the button)
- Cherry pink themed buttons, inventories, and UI elements!
- Redone every inventory screen!

![KonciPET UI preview, with an animated axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4XOSYHAs/images/03cb0a34f6a07cc837d8ab573414d95c5603013b.gif)
![Recipe book preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4XOSYHAs/images/18a022e119974deb6ed4f866e3f11ae41c8b3e57.png)
![KonciPET UI menu buttons and hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e2be212101ecad6c87cdd4231efca9b7dd31a5b.png)
